outputs.name: age_group
outputs.expression: CASE WHEN AGE_YEARS < 18 THEN 'Pediatric' WHEN AGE_YEARS BETWEEN 18 AND 64 THEN 'Adult' ELSE 'Geriatric' END AS age_group

case_expressions.expression: CASE WHEN AGE_YEARS < 18 THEN 'Pediatric' WHEN AGE_YEARS BETWEEN 18 AND 64 THEN 'Adult' ELSE 'Geriatric' END

lineage.expression: CASE WHEN AGE_YEARS < 18 THEN 'Pediatric' WHEN AGE_YEARS BETWEEN 18 AND 64 THEN 'Adult' ELSE 'Geriatric' END AS age_group

raw_sql:
SELECT PAT_MRN_ID,
               
  CASE WHEN AGE_YEARS < 18 THEN 'Pediatric'
                    
  WHEN AGE_YEARS BETWEEN 18 AND 64 THEN 'Adult'
                    
  ELSE 'Geriatric'
               
  END AS age_group
        
  FROM PATIENT
